Strofa 1 :
Nu ma compar deloc cu tine Doamne
In mine ca om am multa rautate
Daia incerc de la o zi la alta
Sa las raul deoparte sa iau bunatatea
Si promisiunea mea fata de tine
Asa va fi ca doar asa imi va fi bine
Nu mai vreau sa mai fac nimic lumesc
Dragoste in tine sa gasesc

Omul fara tine este pierdut
Imi pare rau ca minte n-am avut
Sa te cunosc mai demult trebuia
Dar ma gandeam decat la viata mea

Strofa 2 :
In mine a intrat un duh curat
Toata lumea imi spune ce mult m-am schimbat
Si vreau sa-ti urmez calea pana la sfarsit
Iti multumesc Doamne ca tu m-ai ocrotit
Vreau sa fii umbra mea mereu sa fii cu mine
Ca doar langa tine Domnul meu imi e bine
In tine am toata baza si-ncrederea
Ca lumea din jurul meu e rea

Refren X2
Omul fara tine este pierdut
Imi pare rau ca minte n-am avut
Sa te cunosc mai demult trebuia
Dar ma gandeam decat la viata mea

PLAYONE este pionierul Youtube in Romania in domeniul muzical (gen petrecere, manele, folclor). Portofoliul nostru cuprinde muzica de petrecere si manele cat si pop,hip hop,dance. Urmareste-ne si fii la curent cu cele mai noi realizari ale noastre aici: https://goo.gl/k7kM7M

Fac bani, fac bani,

Fac bani, fac bani,

Fac bani fac bani, 
Rupe-i gura daca-i de scandal,

4 226 doar in clan.

Vrajeala multa,
Destula sa ne ajunga,
Mai trag o dunga, 
Astea vor doar sa ma suga,
Te stiu de mult fa, 
Te-am vazut esti prefacuta,
Vezi c-am valuta,
DaÔÇÖ n-o s-o arunc pe o curva.

Hasta la muerte,
Cine se opune acum pierde,

Departe cum stam de zeghe,
Cand n-ai maniere si ai doar carpe in stanga in dreapta e╚Öti o carpa ah,
E╚Öti doar carpa stai asa,
Nu-i nicio barfa totusi am fost diplomat pula mea,
IoÔÇÖ n-am gustat vreodata barfa gusta tu teava asta,
Baietii tai sunt Oompa loompa ai mei rad in cor,
Stiu cativa tigani care te-ar baga intr-un covor,
Un gest din degete si ai gura intinsa ca un sifon,
Ai grija cumva sa nu dispari nu lasi niciun dor,
Am valuta pe ai tai pe toti ii cumpar,
Foamea poate sa-i rupa dar ce face lacomia e wow,
Ai grija sluga sa nu dispari in vreo duba,
Un gest din incheietura,
Ajungi cu dintii pe bordura ah.

snippet.title: Noi dezv─âluiri despre politizarea institu╚Ťiilor: un animal politic ╚Öi o chelneri╚Ť─â angajat─â inginer
snippet.description:
├Än urm─â cu dou─â luni, Recorder a dezv─âluit (https://youtu.be/JVkqDAP7gAk) c─â, ├«n majoritatea jude╚Ťelor din Rom├ónia, Partidul Na╚Ťional Liberal a instalat la conducerea administra╚Ťiilor bazinale ╚Öi a sistemelor de gospod─ârire a apelor oameni f─âr─â niciun fel de preg─âtire ├«n domeniu, recomanda╚Ťi doar de carnetul de partid.  

Acum v─â ar─ât─âm, cu dovezi ╚Öi cu ├«nregistr─âri din interior, cum numirile politice de la ╚Öefia acestor institu╚Ťii sunt doar o parte a acestui fenomen revolt─âtor. 

La Administra╚Ťia Bazinal─â de Ap─â (ABA) Prut-B├órlad este director Petru Avram, vicepre╚Öedinte PNL Ia╚Öi. Acesta se recomand─â subordona╚Ťilor ca ÔÇ×un animal politic care va ajunge cel pu╚Ťin ministruÔÇŁ ╚Öi le cere speciali╚Ötilor din institu╚Ťie s─â accepte angaja╚Ťi care nu ╚Ötiu nici m─âcar cum se m─âsoar─â debitul unui r├óu. Recent, la departamentul de ap─ârare ├«mpotriva inunda╚Ťiilor a fost angajat─â o t├ón─âr─â care a fost chelneri╚Ť─â la barul Master din Ia╚Öi. 

Un inginer din institu╚Ťie s-a hot─âr├ót s─â vorbeasc─â despre incompeten╚Ťa endemic─â din cadrul Apelor Rom├óne, convins c─â, mai devreme sau mai t├órziu, politizarea acestei structuri va fi pl─âtit─â cu vie╚Ťi omene╚Öti.

--------------

Recorder este o publica╚Ťie online construit─â de o echip─â de jurnali╚Öti ├«n jurul acestor principii: jurnalism onest, f─âcut cu pasiune ╚Öi pus ├«n serviciul public. Pute╚Ťi sus╚Ťine proiectul Recorder printr-o dona╚Ťie aici https://recorder.ro/sustine/ sau aici www.patreon.com/recorder

snippet.title: 3D PEN VS GLUE GUN! 17 Cool Hacks And Crafts For You
snippet.description:
WeÔÇÖve tried every 3D pen and hot glue craft we could imagine, and hereÔÇÖs what we created. ArenÔÇÖt 3D pens just amazing? You can create anything you can think of, make it colorful and give it purpose. Today, we wanted to experiment with something new, and we wanted to show you some amazing hacks you can create at home. But first, letÔÇÖs try some experiments with hot glue. Why buy a bath mat when you can make a colorful one with glitter using hot glue? To make it look store-bought, use a printed pattern and some greaseproof paper on top. Sometimes charging your phone becomes a nuisance, so today, we show you how to create a stand for your phone using a 3D pen. But for those of you who want to get craftier, we show you how to make a beautiful romantic ring from scratch using a 3D pen. Watch until the end to discover some fantastic tricks and crafts youÔÇÖll adore. 

Timestamps: 

1:06 ÔÇö How to fix a broken wood piece 

2:25 ÔÇö DIY ring 

2:48 ÔÇö Beautiful, DIY jewelry holder

snippet.title: 28 PARENTING HACKS From Crafty Moms And Dads || Tips for Being Friends with Your Child
snippet.description:
Tips and tricks every parent will be thankful for. 

Being a parent isnÔÇÖt an easy task, and most of the time, parents come across more problems than they can solve. Well, to help you out, I wanted to share with you some amazing hacks that will save you time and the hassle that comes with taking care of a little one. Painting is everyoneÔÇÖs favorite activity, but it can be very messy ÔÇö and clothes get destroyed. So, to keep your little oneÔÇÖs outfit nice and clean, use a plastic bag as an apron for them. Toddlers tend to drop their pacifiers all the time, and once the pacifier is down, it needs to be cleaned. To prevent that from happening, tie the pacifier on a balloon. You can use a closet organizer and label it for each day of the week to make sure that picking outfits for the day wonÔÇÖt take hours. Watch until the end to discover all the genius parenting hacks you need to know.

Being a parent isnÔÇÖt an easy task, and most of the time, parents come across more problems than they can solve. Well, to help you out, I wanted to share with you some amazing hacks that will save you time and the hassle that comes with taking care of a little one. Painting is everyoneÔÇÖs favorite activity, but it can be very messy ÔÇö and clothes get destroyed. So, to keep your little oneÔÇÖs outfit nice and clean, use a plastic bag as an apron for them. Toddlers tend to drop their pacifiers all the time, and once the pacifier is down, it needs to be cleaned. To prevent that from happening, tie the pacifier on a balloon. You can use a closet organizer and label it for each day of the week to make sure that picking outfits for the day wonÔÇÖt take hours. Watch until the end to discover all the genius parenting hacks you need to know.

0:31 ÔÇö The pacifier hack 

2:42 ÔÇö A little water, pepper, and soap experiment 

5:32 ÔÇö The getting along/best friendsÔÇÖ shirt

8:58 ÔÇö Tasty gummy bear lollies

snippet.title: Vladuta Lupau, Voichita Nemes Andreica ╚Öi Rapsozii Maramuresului - COLAJ Maramures 2021
snippet.description:
Aceste c├óntece sunt din repertoriul doamnei Voichita Neme╚Ö Andreica!
Ne bucur─âm ╚Öi deasemenea suntem foarte m├óndrii c─â am reu╚Öit s─â le readucem ├«n fa╚Ťa dumneavoastr─â ├«n aceast─â formul─â! 

Speram s─â ajung─â la c├ó╚Ťi mai mul╚Ťi dintre voi ╚Öi s─â le primi╚Ťi cu drag, a╚Öa cum le-am preg─âtit noi! Cu foarte mare drag!
Din colaj Vladuta Lupau, Voichita Nemes Andreica ╚Öi Rapsozii Maramuresului - COLAJ Maramures 2021, fac parte melodiile:
Inimioara da-╚Ťi-as multe
C├ónd ai fost lume mai buna 


Mai mereu cu z├ómbetul pe buze, artista Vl─âdu╚Ťa Maria Lup─âu este dovada incontestabil─â c─â folclorul rom├ónesc este respectat, promovat ┼či dus mai departe de genera┼úia t├ón─âr─â a Rom├óniei. La doar 25 de ani, Vl─âdu╚Ťa a ajuns s─â fie cunoscut─â at├ót pe plan na┼úional, c├ót ┼či pe plan interna┼úional.De-a lungul carierei sale, t├ón─âra a c├ó┼čtigat numeroase premii dintre care amintim: Premiul I ÔÇô Festivalul Na╚Ťional ÔÇ×Rapsodia Rom├óneasc─âÔÇŁ; Premiul I ÔÇô Festivalul Na╚Ťional ÔÇ×Maria L─ât─âre╚ŤuÔÇŁ; Premiul III ÔÇô ÔÇ×Strugurele de AurÔÇŁ; Marele Premiu ÔÇ×Festivalul Na╚Ťional de C─ât─ânieÔÇŁ; Marele Premiu ÔÇ×Maria T─ânaseÔÇŁ sau Premiul de Popularitate ÔÇ×Mamaia FolclorÔÇŁ.

snippet.title: Godzilla vs. Kong ÔÇô Official Trailer
snippet.description:
In theaters and streaming exclusively on @HBOMax* March 26.
┬á
*Available on @HBOMax in the US only, for 31 days, at no extra cost to subscribers.

https://www.godzillavskong.com/
https://www.facebook.com/GodzillaVsKong
https://www.instagram.com/godzillavskong/
https://twitter.com/GodzillaVsKong

---

From Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures comes the long-awaited face-off between two icons, ÔÇťGodzilla vs. Kong,ÔÇŁ the next epic adventure in LegendaryÔÇÖs cinematic Monsterverse, directed by Adam Wingard.

Legends collide in ÔÇťGodzilla vs. KongÔÇŁ as these mythic adversaries meet in a spectacular battle for the ages, with the fate of the world hanging in the balance.  Kong and his protectors undertake a perilous journey to find his true home, and with them is Jia, a young orphaned girl with whom he has formed a unique and powerful bond.  But they unexpectedly find themselves in the path of an enraged Godzilla, cutting a swath of destruction across the globe.  The epic clash between the two titansÔÇöinstigated by unseen forcesÔÇöis only the beginning of the mystery that lies deep within the core of the Earth.

The film stars Alexander Skarsg├ąrd (ÔÇťBig Little Lies,ÔÇŁ ÔÇťThe Little Drummer GirlÔÇŁ), Millie Bobby Brown (ÔÇťStranger ThingsÔÇŁ), Rebecca Hall (ÔÇťChristine,ÔÇŁ ÔÇťProfessor Marston and the Wonder WomenÔÇŁ), Brian Tyree Henry (ÔÇťJoker,ÔÇŁ ÔÇťSpider-Man: Into the Spider-VerseÔÇŁ), Shun Oguri (ÔÇťWeathering with YouÔÇŁ), Eiza Gonz├ílez (ÔÇťFast & Furious Presents: Hobbs & ShawÔÇŁ), Julian Dennison (ÔÇťDeadpool 2ÔÇŁ), with Kyle Chandler (ÔÇťGodzilla: King of the MonstersÔÇŁ) and Demi├ín Bichir (ÔÇťThe Nun,ÔÇŁ ÔÇťThe Hateful EightÔÇŁ).
Wingard (ÔÇťThe Guest,ÔÇŁ ÔÇťYouÔÇÖre NextÔÇŁ) directed from a screenplay by Eric Pearson (ÔÇťThor: RagnarokÔÇŁ) and Max Borenstein (ÔÇťGodzilla: King of the Monsters,ÔÇŁ ÔÇťKong: Skull IslandÔÇŁ), story by Terry Rossio (ÔÇťPirates of the Caribbean: Dead Men Tell No TalesÔÇŁ) and Michael Dougherty & Zach Shields (ÔÇťGodzilla: King of the MonstersÔÇŁ), based on the character ÔÇťGodzillaÔÇŁ owned and created by TOHO CO., LTD.  The film was produced by Mary Parent, Alex Garcia, Eric McLeod, Jon Jashni, Thomas Tull and Brian Rogers, with Jay Ashenfelter, Herbert W. Gains, Dan Lin, Roy Lee, Yoshimitsu Banno and Kenji Okuhira executive producing.
